name: Union County Public Schools
districtFact: Union County Public Schools serves Union County communities southeast of Charlotte, including Monroe, Indian Trail, Waxhaw, Weddington, Marvin, and Stallings.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for UCPS Families
content: Download or sync the traditional UCPS calendar before booking travel, camps, or recurring childcare.
Confirm whether your student follows the traditional, Early College, or Wolfe School calendar.
Add standalone no-school weekdays and major breaks to family calendars.
Families near the Mecklenburg County line should compare UCPS and CMS break dates before planning shared childcare or travel.
Check school-level athletics, graduation, exams, orientation, and transportation updates separately.

districtFaqs.q: Is Union County Public Schools part of Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools?
districtFaqs.a: No. Union County Public Schools and Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools are separate public school districts. UCPS serves Union County communities such as Monroe, Indian Trail, Waxhaw, Weddington, Marvin, and Stallings. CMS serves Mecklenburg County.

districtFaqs.q: Which UCPS calendar should families use?
districtFaqs.a: Most students follow the UCPS Traditional Schools Academic Calendar. If UCPS publishes a separate calendar for a student's school or program, such as Wolfe School or Early College when available, families should use that calendar instead of assuming the traditional dates apply.

districtFaqs.q: How should families moving to Union County verify school assignment?
districtFaqs.a: UCPS assigns schools by exact residential address, not by neighborhood name alone. Families should verify the assigned elementary, middle, and high school directly with UCPS before making housing decisions.

districtFaqs.q: Can UCPS calendar dates change because of weather?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. UCPS can revise the calendar after winter ice, severe storms, flooding, board action, or other operational needs. Families should verify the official UCPS calendar before booking nonrefundable travel or childcare.

relatedDistricts.name: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Neighboring Mecklenburg County district. Useful for families comparing school calendars across the Charlotte metro.

relatedDistricts.name: Cabarrus County Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Nearby Charlotte-area district with separate traditional, Early College, and Restart calendars.
